installCommand: if [ -d frontend/tourist-risk-platform ]; then cd frontend/tourist-risk-platform; elif [ -d tourist-risk-platform ]; then cd tourist-risk-platform; fi; npm install
buildCommand: if [ -d frontend/tourist-risk-platform ]; then cd frontend/tourist-risk-platform; elif [ -d tourist-risk-platform ]; then cd tourist-risk-platform; fi; npm run build
